_INSTRUCTIONS: Merge this fragment into ~/.claude/settings.json under the top-level 'hooks' key. The 'Stop' entry can be added as a new key. The 'Notification' entry should be APPENDED to the existing Notification[0].hooks[] array if you have other Notification hooks (e.g. notify-tts.sh). Replace $HOME with your actual home path — Claude Code does NOT expand env vars in the command string. Remove this _INSTRUCTIONS field after merging.
